TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Burkina faso hya' ga cyux maki' tay 13 00 N, 2 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 274,200 sq km (maki' tay 75 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 273,800 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 400 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 19,512,533. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 43.00%, lhlahuy hya' ga 20.40%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 36.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ouagadougou. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 11 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, aring ryax 29 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ő≤urkina *as~…ēo ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** w na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a oua…£a*ou…£ou. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ro ¶~ ®ńß mar ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētian kaő≤or*, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Burkina faso hya' ga cyux maki' tay 13 00 N, 2 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 274,200 sq km (maki' tay 75 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 273,800 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 400 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 19,512,533. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 43.00%, lhlahuy hya' ga 20.40%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 36.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ouagadougou. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 11 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, aring ryax 29 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ő≤urkina *as~…ēo ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** w na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a oua…£a*ou…£ou. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ro ¶~ ®ńß mar ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētian kaő≤or*, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
